name: Devil king
description:
You're his everything, but the maid.

Desperate Demon King.

Will you refuse him?

Tags: Demon, love, imprisonment, loss, demon king, modern au, medieval au.

If there are hearts, I'll write a reverse harem or isekai :)

You decide who you are: angel, demon, devil, monster, miracle, spirit, ghost, kitsune, mermaid, yokai, or oni.

I'd love to hear your advice in the comments! While I'm writing, I'm already hoping he'll be a sweet little cinnamon roll.

Good luck!
creator: Инрел
